steps.title: Check current backstage setup
steps.description:
Verify your backstage version and configuration:
```bash
npx backstage-cli info
```
This feature requires a working backstage installation.

steps.title: Review backstage configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant backstage configuration:
## Feature Suggestion

Support rendering `openapi: 3.1.x` API definitions in Backstage. OpenAPI 3.1.0 [was released](https://github.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification/releases/tag/3.1.0) as stable in the beginning of the year.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [plugin-api-docs] Support OpenAPI 3.1
steps.description: …ith openapi-explorer ## Hey, I just made a Pull Request! Replaces SwaggerUI with openapi-explorer in order to support OpenAPI 3.1 specifications. Enhancement to resolve issue #8090 #### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist - [X] A changeset describing the change and affected packages. ([more See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[plugin-api-docs] Support OpenAPI 3.1" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
…ith openapi-explorer

## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!
Replaces SwaggerUI with openapi-explorer in order to support OpenAPI 3.1 specifications.

prerequisites.description: A working backstage installation or development environment.
